title: Notes from the Star Market
synopsis: Zap, a small purple alien with three yellow eyes, explores a magical market before the Festival of Falling Stars. Through notes and letters exchanged with mysterious market vendors, Zap receives an unexpected gift that changes everything.

pages.text:
Purple smoke rises from the cooking fires. Zap walks between the market stalls. His three yellow eyes blink at the strange sights. Tomorrow is the Festival of Falling Stars. Everyone is shopping. 

A piece of paper flutters to his feet. It has his name on it.

'Dear Zap,
You don't know me yet. I am the Starweaver. I make wishes come true during festivals. Look for the tent with silver bells. Inside you will find something special.
From,
S.W.'

Zap looks around. He sees tents everywhere. Red tents. Blue tents. Green tents with golden stripes.

illustration.description: A busy market scene with colorful tents and cooking fires producing purple smoke. Zap, a small purple alien with three big luminous yellow eyes, two antennae, smooth lavender skin, tiny arms, and a round friendly face, holds a note while looking around. Enchanted forest backdrop, glowing mushrooms, fairy lights, mystical creatures, rich greens and purples, golden sparkles, Studio Ghibli inspired, magical atmosphere, detailed foliage.
illustration.alt: Zap the purple alien holds a mysterious note in a bustling magical market

pages.text:
Zap finds the tent with silver bells. They ring softly in the wind. Inside sits a woman made of starlight. Her hair glows like moonbeams.

'You must be Zap,' she says. 'I have been waiting.'

The Starweaver hands him a small wooden box. 'This is from someone who knew your grandfather. Long ago, he saved our village from the Storm Dragons.'

Zap has never heard this story. His three eyes grow wide.

illustration.description: Inside a tent decorated with silver bells, a glowing woman made of starlight sits across from Zap, a small purple alien with three big luminous yellow eyes, two antennae, smooth lavender skin, tiny arms, and a round friendly face. She holds a wooden box. The tent interior glows with enchanted forest ambiance, glowing mushrooms, fairy lights, mystical atmosphere, rich greens and purples, golden sparkles, Studio Ghibli inspired, detailed foliage visible through tent opening.
illustration.alt: Zap meets the glowing Starweaver inside a tent with silver bells

pages.text:
Zap leaves the tent with the wooden box. He wants to open it. But first he needs to think.

He stops at the bread stall. The baker has three arms and flour in her beard. She looks at Zap and smiles.

'You look confused, little alien,' she says. 'I have something for you.'

She gives him a warm roll. There is a note baked inside.

'Dear Zap,
Your grandfather was brave. He rode the Wind Horses across the sky. He fought the Storm Dragons with lightning bolts. We remember him every Festival Day.
From,
The Village Baker'

illustration.description: At a bread stall, a three-armed baker with flour in her beard hands a warm roll to Zap, a small purple alien with three big luminous yellow eyes, two antennae, smooth lavender skin, tiny arms, and a round friendly face. Zap holds the wooden box in one tiny arm. The stall is surrounded by enchanted forest elements, glowing mushrooms, fairy lights, mystical creatures, rich greens and purples, golden sparkles, Studio Ghibli inspired, magical atmosphere, detailed foliage.
illustration.alt: The three-armed baker gives Zap a roll with a hidden note inside

pages.text:
Zap eats the warm bread. It tastes like cinnamon and starlight. Now he is very curious about his grandfather.

Wind Horses? Storm Dragons? Lightning bolts?

His family never told him these stories. They only said Grandfather traveled a lot.

Zap decides to write his own note. He borrows a pencil from a flower seller.

illustration.description: Zap, a small purple alien with three big luminous yellow eyes, two antennae, smooth lavender skin, tiny arms, and a round friendly face, writes on a piece of paper while sitting on a wooden crate. Around him are flower stalls with mystical blooms. The scene has enchanted forest atmosphere, glowing mushrooms, fairy lights, mystical creatures, rich greens and purples, golden sparkles, Studio Ghibli inspired, magical atmosphere, detailed foliage.
illustration.alt: Zap writes a note while surrounded by magical flower stalls

pages.text:
'Dear Anyone Who Knew My Grandfather,
I am Zap. I live on Purple Moon Street. I never heard about Wind Horses or Storm Dragons. Can you tell me more stories? I have a wooden box but I haven't opened it yet.
From,
Zap'

He leaves the note on the message board. The message board is made from a giant mushroom. Notes grow on it like leaves.

illustration.description: A giant glowing mushroom serves as a message board with notes growing like leaves all over it. Zap, a small purple alien with three big luminous yellow eyes, two antennae, smooth lavender skin, tiny arms, and a round friendly face, pins his note to the mushroom. The scene is filled with enchanted forest elements, glowing mushrooms, fairy lights, mystical creatures, rich greens and purples, golden sparkles, Studio Ghibli inspired, magical atmosphere, detailed foliage.
illustration.alt: Zap posts his note on a giant mushroom message board

pages.text:
Three notes appear immediately. They grow from the mushroom like magic.

Note One: 'Your grandfather had the kindest heart. - The Wizard'
Note Two: 'He taught my children to fly. - The Dragon Mother'
Note Three: 'He saved my garden from the Great Flood. - Old Rose'

Zap feels warm inside. His grandfather was a hero. Now he wants to open the wooden box.

Inside is a small pair of silver wings. They sparkle like stars. A final note sits underneath.

'Dear Zap,
These wings belonged to your grandfather. They will teach you to be brave like him. Wear them during tomorrow's festival.
From,
Everyone Who Remembers'

Zap puts on the wings. They fit perfectly. He feels ready for adventure.

illustration.description: Zap, a small purple alien with three big luminous yellow eyes, two antennae, smooth lavender skin, tiny arms, and a round friendly face, now wearing sparkling silver wings, holds the wooden box. Magic notes float around him like butterflies. The market bustles in the background with enchanted forest elements, glowing mushrooms, fairy lights, mystical creatures, rich greens and purples, golden sparkles, Studio Ghibli inspired, magical atmosphere, detailed foliage.
illustration.alt: Zap wears magical silver wings while magical notes float around him like butterflies

coverPrompt.description: A bustling magical market with colorful tents and floating lanterns. In the center stands Zap, a small purple alien with three big luminous yellow eyes, two antennae, smooth lavender skin, tiny arms, and a round friendly face. Vendors sell glowing fruits and sparkling trinkets. Enchanted forest surrounds the market, with glowing mushrooms, fairy lights, mystical creatures, rich greens and purples, golden sparkles, Studio Ghibli inspired magical atmosphere, detailed foliage.
coverPrompt.alt: A small purple three-eyed alien named Zap stands in a magical market filled with glowing items and mystical vendors

questions.question: Who wrote the first note to Zap?
questions.explanation: The Starweaver signed the first note 'S.W.' and told Zap to look for the tent with silver bells.

questions.question: What did Zap's grandfather fight?
questions.explanation: The baker's note said Zap's grandfather fought Storm Dragons with lightning bolts.

questions.question: Where did the baker hide her note?
questions.explanation: The baker baked her note inside a warm roll that she gave to Zap.

questions.question: What gift was inside the wooden box?
questions.explanation: The wooden box contained a pair of silver wings that sparkled like stars and belonged to Zap's grandfather.

questions.question: When is Zap supposed to wear the wings?
questions.explanation: The final note told Zap to wear the wings during tomorrow's Festival of Falling Stars.
